9
10#ifndef LLVM_MC_MCELFOBJECTWRITER_H
11#define LLVM_MC_MCELFOBJECTWRITER_H
12
13#include "llvm/ADT/Triple.h"
14#include "llvm/Support/DataTypes.h"
15#include "llvm/Support/ELF.h"
16#include <vector>
17
18namespace llvm {
19class MCAssembler;
20class MCFixup;
21class MCFragment;
22class MCObjectWriter;
23class MCSectionData;
24class MCSymbol;
25class MCSymbolData;
26class MCValue;
27
28class MCELFObjectTargetWriter {
29 const uint8_t OSABI;
30 const uint16_t EMachine;
31 const unsigned HasRelocationAddend : 1;
32 const unsigned Is64Bit : 1;
33 const unsigned IsN64 : 1;
34
35protected:
36
37 MCELFObjectTargetWriter(bool Is64Bit_, uint8_t OSABI_,
38 uint16_t EMachine_, bool HasRelocationAddend,
39 bool IsN64=false);
40
41public:
42 static uint8_t getOSABI(Triple::OSType OSType) {
43 switch (OSType) {
44 case Triple::FreeBSD:
45 return ELF::ELFOSABI_FREEBSD;
46 case Triple::Linux:
47 return ELF::ELFOSABI_LINUX;
48 default:
49 return ELF::ELFOSABI_NONE;
50 }
51 }
52
53 virtual ~MCELFObjectTargetWriter() {}
54
55 virtual unsigned GetRelocType(const MCValue &Target, const MCFixup &Fixup,
56 bool IsPCRel) const = 0;
57
58 virtual bool needsRelocateWithSymbol(const MCSymbolData &SD,
59 unsigned Type) const;
60
61 /// @name Accessors
62 /// @{
63 uint8_t getOSABI() const { return OSABI; }
64 uint16_t getEMachine() const { return EMachine; }
65 bool hasRelocationAddend() const { return HasRelocationAddend; }
66 bool is64Bit() const { return Is64Bit; }
67 bool isN64() const { return IsN64; }
68 /// @}
69
70 // Instead of changing everyone's API we pack the N64 Type fields
71 // into the existing 32 bit data unsigned.
72#define R_TYPE_SHIFT 0
73#define R_TYPE_MASK 0xffffff00
74#define R_TYPE2_SHIFT 8
75#define R_TYPE2_MASK 0xffff00ff
76#define R_TYPE3_SHIFT 16
77#define R_TYPE3_MASK 0xff00ffff
78#define R_SSYM_SHIFT 24
79#define R_SSYM_MASK 0x00ffffff
80
81 // N64 relocation type accessors
82 uint8_t getRType(uint32_t Type) const {
83 return (unsigned)((Type >> R_TYPE_SHIFT) & 0xff);
84 }
85 uint8_t getRType2(uint32_t Type) const {
86 return (unsigned)((Type >> R_TYPE2_SHIFT) & 0xff);
87 }
88 uint8_t getRType3(uint32_t Type) const {
89 return (unsigned)((Type >> R_TYPE3_SHIFT) & 0xff);
90 }
91 uint8_t getRSsym(uint32_t Type) const {
92 return (unsigned)((Type >> R_SSYM_SHIFT) & 0xff);
93 }
94
95 // N64 relocation type setting
96 unsigned setRType(unsigned Value, unsigned Type) const {
97 return ((Type & R_TYPE_MASK) | ((Value & 0xff) << R_TYPE_SHIFT));
98 }
99 unsigned setRType2(unsigned Value, unsigned Type) const {
100 return (Type & R_TYPE2_MASK) | ((Value & 0xff) << R_TYPE2_SHIFT);
101 }
102 unsigned setRType3(unsigned Value, unsigned Type) const {
103 return (Type & R_TYPE3_MASK) | ((Value & 0xff) << R_TYPE3_SHIFT);
104 }
105 unsigned setRSsym(unsigned Value, unsigned Type) const {
106 return (Type & R_SSYM_MASK) | ((Value & 0xff) << R_SSYM_SHIFT);
107 }
108};
109
110/// \brief Construct a new ELF writer instance.
111///
112/// \param MOTW - The target specific ELF writer subclass.
113/// \param OS - The stream to write to.
114/// \returns The constructed object writer.
115MCObjectWriter *createELFObjectWriter(MCELFObjectTargetWriter *MOTW,
116 raw_ostream &OS, bool IsLittleEndian);
117} // End llvm namespace
118
119#endif
